modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to set up and upload video on USD website

full_description_text:  
A field technician is attempting to create a Vimeo setup on the USD website. The request includes uploading a new video to the platform. There seems to be an issue with the video setup process that needs to be addressed.
short_description: Request to set up and upload video on USD website
description: A field technician is attempting to create a Vimeo setup on the USD website. The request includes uploading a new video to the platform. There seems to be an issue with the video setup process that needs to be addressed.
